creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
New ports: ${PORTSDIR}/news/jam-leafnode

This ports, jam-leafnode is leafnode with some nice enhancements patch.

This patch is made by Kazushi (Jam) Marukawa <jam@pobox.com>.
The details of enhancements is:
  http://www.io.com/~kazushi/freeware/#leafnode


I have proposed another ports for a leafnode package.
But, to tell the truth, I want to substitute this ports
for ${PORTSDIR}/news/leafnode.
Do you think about this plan?


Thank you.

--- shige

Fix: Uuencoded tar.gz style.
